---
title: "荣誉奖项"
anchor: "honors"
---

# 荣誉奖项

## 学术奖学金

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-trophy"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
一等奖学金，中山大学
::: award-description
2023-2024学年 | 年级前5%
:::
:::

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-trophy"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
二等奖学金，中山大学
::: award-description
2022-2023学年 | 年级前10%
:::
:::

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-trophy"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
[其他奖学金名称]
::: award-description
[颁发机构] | [年份]
:::
:::

## 学科竞赛

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-medal"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
[竞赛名称]
::: award-description
[奖项，如：一等奖/ Bronze Medal] | [年份]
:::
:::

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-medal"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
[竞赛名称]
::: award-description
[奖项] | [年份]
:::
:::

## 其他荣誉

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-star"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
[荣誉称号]
::: award-description
[颁发机构] | [年份]
:::
:::

::: award-item
::: award-icon
<i class="fas fa-star"></i>
:::
::: award-content
::: award-title
[其他荣誉或认证]
::: award-description
[机构] | [年份]
:::
:::
